_description: Sends JR a daily morning brief at 8 AM ET via Telegram with queue status, processing stats, and inbox summary.
name: OpenClaw: Morning Brief

nodes.name: Daily 8 AM ET
nodes.notes: Fires at 8 AM ET, Monday through Saturday.

nodes.name: Get Queue Counts
nodes.notes: Collects status data from Gmail labels. Customize with actual label queries.

nodes.name: Get Processing Items
nodes.notes: Gets items currently in processing on Amanda's side.

nodes.name: Build Brief Message
nodes.notes: Assembles the morning brief text from collected data.
